DeliverCon2024.2

Samuel Hoskin • Posted on 7 November 2024 • Last updated 28 February 2025 • Tags:

Key Details

​📌 MoJ, 102 Petty France, London SW1H 9AJ

​📅 10:00 Thursday 7 November 2024

📃 Notes (Photos) - Google Photo Album

📚 Notes (Written) - Google Drive

📷 Pictures of the day - Google Photo Album

Agenda

Session 1 - 11:10 to 11:55

Room Session
3 How can digital collaboration be more effective?
Main Top tips for being a great delivery manager
5 How to use AI in delivery
6 Dealing with conflict
7 What do you think about SME contractors versus permanent employees?

Session 2 - 12:10 to 12:55

Room Session
Main How to grow as a delivery manager
4 Best things / activities to do async versus in person
5 How do you keep teams engaged during change?
6 How can you as a delivery manager help retain organisational memory?
7 How to drive agility in non-agile environments (championing agile)

Lunch - 12:55 to 13:45

🥪🌯🍛☕🥛

Session 3 - 13:45 to 14:30

Room Session
3 How can we quantify the contribution of delivery managers?
4 The difference between deliver manager and product manager roles
5 Is 100% agile working really right or achievable for government?
6 How safe / empowered do we (as delivery managers) feel we can challenge thinking?
7 What are we doing differently as a result of hiring freezes?

Session 4 - 14:45 to 15:30

Room Session
3 How do we bring positive energy, when we feel negative?
4 How to effectively delivery manage introverts?
5 What to measure to assess team effectiveness?
6 What would a delivery manager apprenticeship look like?
7 How can we change organisational design / structure to enable delivery?

Session 5 - 15:45 to 16:30

Room Session
3 What isn’t delivery management?
4 How can we collaborate across organisations to be effective
5 How do you make stand ups more interesting and interactive?
6 How do we start a useful community of practice and grow it?
7 What is the biggest challenge for face as a delivery manager?
